title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Repository Template Mission
summary: An engineering enablement group. The group needs maintained repository variants with compatible tools, required checks, fast local feedback, and measurable value. Planned artifact: Deliver Risk-Profiled Repository Gate Factory with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Rank correctness, security, accessibility, performance, compatibility, and maintenance risks.
Connect stable named checks to branch protection and define cancellation and rerun policy.
Offer risk-based language and project profiles instead of one universal template.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact

gates-capstone-defense-1sfwcr:

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
